reasoning_model_1: The model failed the most fundamental criterion of Content Accuracy. The user requested the model to read a specific sentence: '今天的会议就像一部冗长的肥皂剧，唯一的作用就是消耗我们的生命值。'. However, Model 1 generated and spoke a completely different, improvised paragraph ('今天的会议简直像一部连续剧，剧情拖沓得...'). According to the scoring standard, if the voice content is clearly inconsistent with the script, the audio must be assigned a score of 0, regardless of its paralinguistic performance.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 followed the content instructions with high accuracy, adding only a single modal particle '啊' (00:01) which serves to enhance the colloquial and complaining tone required for the humor. The speech is fluent and natural. In terms of the core paralinguistic feature '诙谐幽默' (Humorous/Witty), the model successfully adopts a sarcastic, weary storytelling tone. The elongation of '啊' (00:01) and the stress on '冗长' (00:03) effectively convey the feeling of a witty complaint about the boring meeting, matching the intended style vividy.
model_comparison: Model 1 is a complete failure due to non-compliance with the text script (hallucination). It generated a free-form response instead of reading the target text. Model 2 adhered to the text (with one stylistically appropriate particle addition) and accurately expressed the requested humorous and sarcastic tone. Therefore, Model 2 is the clear winner.
